STS2_WINE_FOX_POTION_POTATO.title: Potato
STS2_WINE_FOX_POTION_POTATO.description:
Gain 2 HP and 3 Block.
You can also throw it at the [gold]Merchant[/gold] to gain [blue]10[/blue][gold] Gold[/gold].
